snippets.description:
BatchCreateResourceValueConfigs creates a ResourceValueConfig for an organization. Maps user's tags to
difference resource values for use by the attack path simulation.
snippets.title: securitycenter BatchCreateResourceValueConfigs Sample

snippets.description:
BulkMuteFindings kicks off an LRO to bulk mute findings for a parent based on a filter. The
parent can be either an organization, folder or project. The findings
matched by the filter will be muted after the LRO is done.
snippets.title: securitycenter BulkMuteFindings Sample

snippets.description: CancelOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: securitycenter CancelOperation Sample

snippets.description: CreateBigQueryExport creates a BigQuery export.
snippets.title: securitycenter CreateBigQueryExport Sample

snippets.description:
CreateEventThreatDetectionCustomModule creates a resident Event Threat Detection custom module at the scope of the
given Resource Manager parent, and also creates inherited custom modules
for all descendants of the given parent. These modules are enabled by
default.
snippets.title: securitycenter CreateEventThreatDetectionCustomModule Sample

snippets.description:
CreateFinding creates a finding. The corresponding source must exist for finding creation
to succeed.
snippets.title: securitycenter CreateFinding Sample

snippets.description: CreateMuteConfig creates a mute config.
snippets.title: securitycenter CreateMuteConfig Sample

snippets.description: CreateNotificationConfig creates a notification config.
snippets.title: securitycenter CreateNotificationConfig Sample

snippets.description:
CreateSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule creates a resident SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule at the scope of the
given CRM parent, and also creates inherited
SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules for all CRM descendants of the given
parent. These modules are enabled by default.
snippets.title: securitycenter CreateSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule Sample

snippets.description: CreateSource creates a source.
snippets.title: securitycenter CreateSource Sample

snippets.description: DeleteBigQueryExport deletes an existing BigQuery export.
snippets.title: securitycenter DeleteBigQueryExport Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteEventThreatDetectionCustomModule deletes the specified Event Threat Detection custom module and all of its
descendants in the Resource Manager hierarchy. This method is only
supported for resident custom modules.
snippets.title: securitycenter DeleteEventThreatDetectionCustomModule Sample

snippets.description: DeleteMuteConfig deletes an existing mute config.
snippets.title: securitycenter DeleteMuteConfig Sample

snippets.description: DeleteNotificationConfig deletes a notification config.
snippets.title: securitycenter DeleteNotificationConfig Sample

snippets.description: DeleteOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: securitycenter DeleteOperation Sample

snippets.description: DeleteResourceValueConfig deletes a ResourceValueConfig.
snippets.title: securitycenter DeleteResourceValueConfig Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule deletes the specified SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule and all of its
descendants in the CRM hierarchy. This method is only supported for
resident custom modules.
snippets.title: securitycenter DeleteSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule Sample

snippets.description: GetBigQueryExport gets a BigQuery export.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetBigQueryExport Sample

snippets.description: GetEffectiveEventThreatDetectionCustomModule gets an effective Event Threat Detection custom module at the given level.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetEffectiveEventThreatDetectionCustomModule Sample

snippets.description: GetEffectiveSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule retrieves an EffectiveSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetEffectiveSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule Sample

snippets.description: GetEventThreatDetectionCustomModule gets an Event Threat Detection custom module.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetEventThreatDetectionCustomModule Sample

snippets.description: GetIamPolicy gets the access control policy on the specified Source.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: GetMuteConfig gets a mute config.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetMuteConfig Sample

snippets.description: GetNotificationConfig gets a notification config.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetNotificationConfig Sample

snippets.description: GetOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetOperation Sample

snippets.description: GetOrganizationSettings gets the settings for an organization.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetOrganizationSettings Sample

snippets.description: GetResourceValueConfig gets a ResourceValueConfig.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetResourceValueConfig Sample

snippets.description: GetSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule retrieves a SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule Sample

snippets.description:
GetSimulation get the simulation by name or the latest simulation for the given
organization.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetSimulation Sample

snippets.description: GetSource gets a source.
snippets.title: securitycenter GetSource Sample

snippets.description: GetValuedResource get the valued resource by name
snippets.title: securitycenter GetValuedResource Sample

snippets.description:
GroupAssets filters an organization's assets and  groups them by their specified
properties.


Deprecated: GroupAssets may be removed in a future version.
snippets.title: securitycenter GroupAssets Sample

snippets.description:
GroupFindings filters an organization or source's findings and  groups them by their
specified properties.

To group across all sources provide a `-` as the source id.
Example: /v1/organizations/{organization_id}/sources/-/findings,
/v1/folders/{folder_id}/sources/-/findings,
/v1/projects/{project_id}/sources/-/findings
snippets.title: securitycenter GroupFindings Sample

snippets.description:
ListAssets lists an organization's assets.


Deprecated: ListAssets may be removed in a future version.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListAssets Sample

snippets.description:
ListAttackPaths lists the attack paths for a set of simulation results or valued resources
and filter.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListAttackPaths Sample

snippets.description:
ListBigQueryExports lists BigQuery exports. Note that when requesting BigQuery exports at a
given level all exports under that level are also returned e.g. if
requesting BigQuery exports under a folder, then all BigQuery exports
immediately under the folder plus the ones created under the projects
within the folder are returned.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListBigQueryExports Sample

snippets.description:
ListDescendantEventThreatDetectionCustomModules lists all resident Event Threat Detection custom modules under the
given Resource Manager parent and its descendants.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListDescendantEventThreatDetectionCustomModules Sample

snippets.description:
ListDescendantSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules returns a list of all resident SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules under
the given CRM parent and all of the parent’s CRM descendants.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListDescendantSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules Sample

snippets.description:
ListEffectiveEventThreatDetectionCustomModules lists all effective Event Threat Detection custom modules for the
given parent. This includes resident modules defined at the scope of the
parent along with modules inherited from its ancestors.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListEffectiveEventThreatDetectionCustomModules Sample

snippets.description:
ListEffectiveSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules returns a list of all EffectiveSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules for the
given parent. This includes resident modules defined at the scope of the
parent, and inherited modules, inherited from CRM ancestors.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListEffectiveSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules Sample

snippets.description:
ListEventThreatDetectionCustomModules lists all Event Threat Detection custom modules for the given
Resource Manager parent. This includes resident modules defined at the
scope of the parent along with modules inherited from ancestors.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListEventThreatDetectionCustomModules Sample

snippets.description:
ListFindings lists an organization or source's findings.

To list across all sources provide a `-` as the source id.
Example: /v1/organizations/{organization_id}/sources/-/findings
snippets.title: securitycenter ListFindings Sample

snippets.description: ListMuteConfigs lists mute configs.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListMuteConfigs Sample

snippets.description: ListNotificationConfigs lists notification configs.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListNotificationConfigs Sample

snippets.description: ListOperations is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListOperations Sample

snippets.description: ListResourceValueConfigs lists all ResourceValueConfigs.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListResourceValueConfigs Sample

snippets.description:
ListSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules returns a list of all SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules for the given
parent. This includes resident modules defined at the scope of the parent,
and inherited modules, inherited from CRM ancestors.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModules Sample

snippets.description: ListSources lists all sources belonging to an organization.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListSources Sample

snippets.description: ListValuedResources lists the valued resources for a set of simulation results and filter.
snippets.title: securitycenter ListValuedResources Sample

snippets.description:
RunAssetDiscovery runs asset discovery. The discovery is tracked with a long-running
operation.

This API can only be called with limited frequency for an organization. If
it is called too frequently the caller will receive a TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
error.


Deprecated: RunAssetDiscovery may be removed in a future version.
snippets.title: securitycenter RunAssetDiscovery Sample

snippets.description: SetFindingState updates the state of a finding.
snippets.title: securitycenter SetFindingState Sample

snippets.description: SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified Source.
snippets.title: securitycenter SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: SetMute updates the mute state of a finding.
snippets.title: securitycenter SetMute Sample

snippets.description: SimulateSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule simulates a given SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule and Resource.
snippets.title: securitycenter SimulateSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule Sample

snippets.description: TestIamPermissions returns the permissions that a caller has on the specified source.
snippets.title: securitycenter TestIamPermissions Sample

snippets.description: UpdateBigQueryExport updates a BigQuery export.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateBigQueryExport Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateEventThreatDetectionCustomModule updates the Event Threat Detection custom module with the given name based
on the given update mask. Updating the enablement state is supported for
both resident and inherited modules (though resident modules cannot have an
enablement state of "inherited"). Updating the display name or
configuration of a module is supported for resident modules only. The type
of a module cannot be changed.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateEventThreatDetectionCustomModule Sample

snippets.description: UpdateExternalSystem updates external system. This is for a given finding.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateExternalSystem Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateFinding creates or updates a finding. The corresponding source must exist for a
finding creation to succeed.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateFinding Sample

snippets.description: UpdateMuteConfig updates a mute config.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateMuteConfig Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateNotificationConfig updates a notification config. The following update
fields are allowed: description, pubsub_topic, streaming_config.filter
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateNotificationConfig Sample

snippets.description: UpdateOrganizationSettings updates an organization's settings.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateOrganizationSettings Sample

snippets.description: UpdateResourceValueConfig updates an existing ResourceValueConfigs with new rules.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateResourceValueConfig Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule updates the SecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule under the given name based
on the given update mask. Updating the enablement state is supported on
both resident and inherited modules (though resident modules cannot have an
enablement state of "inherited"). Updating the display name and custom
config of a module is supported on resident modules only.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateSecurityHealthAnalyticsCustomModule Sample

snippets.description: UpdateSecurityMarks updates security marks.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateSecurityMarks Sample

snippets.description: UpdateSource updates a source.
snippets.title: securitycenter UpdateSource Sample

snippets.description: ValidateEventThreatDetectionCustomModule validates the given Event Threat Detection custom module.
snippets.title: securitycenter ValidateEventThreatDetectionCustomModule Sample
